mapper.select: /** 강의실 통계 */ select b.room_seq ,min(b.edu_dt) edu_period_begin ,max(b.edu_dt) edu_period_end from t_lecture a inner join t_lecture_time b on a.edu_seq = b.edu_seq where b.room_seq > 0 and IFNULL(b.edu_dt ,'') != '' and b.edu_dt between replace(#{srchStartDay},'-','') and replace(#{srchEndDay},'-','') group by b.room_seq
